creator: trix@basement.net
text:
I am also experiencing problems with net-mgmt/php5-snmp.  I believe
that the underlying issue lies with -fstack-protector and
net-mgmt/net-snmp.  The undefined symbol is in
/usr/local/lib/libnetsnmp.so.16.  When net-mgmt/net-snmp is compiled
under 7.2-RELEASE, the __stack_chk_fail_local symbol is not present in
libnetsnmp.so.  

This symbol should be in /lib/libssp.so.0, but I have seen various
mentions that it should be provided in /usr/lib/libc.so.  I do not
know why ld.so is not picking up the reference.  

Applying the following patch to /usr/ports/net-mgmt/net-snmp/Makefile
appears to make no difference.

-- BEGIN PATCH --
--- Makefile-orig       2009-12-06 17:12:41.000000000 -0600
+++ Makefile    2009-12-06 17:15:50.000000000 -0600
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@
                --with-sys-location="${NET_SNMP_SYS_LOCATION}" \
                --with-logfile="${NET_SNMP_LOGFILE}" \
                --with-persistent-directory="${NET_SNMP_PERSISTENTDIR}"
		\
-               --with-libwrap --with-libs="-lm -lkvm -ldevstat"
+               --with-libwrap --with-libs="-lm -lkvm -ldevstat -lssp"

 .if defined(BATCH)
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--with-defaults
--  END PATCH  --

This appears to be the same type of problem (albeit with a different
port) as referenced in ports/140791.

-- 
John D. "Trix" Farrar, CCNA         __\\|//__               Basement.NET
trix@basement.net                   (` o-o ')   http://www.basement.net/
